svg.desc:
Psychrometic chart that shows the current working point and informations about the currently selected ASHRAE envelope. Ver 1.0.0
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ This page plots two working points into the Humidity-Ratio VS Dry Bulb Temperature diagram. The humidity is reported in grams of water per kilogram of air. The temperature is reported in Celsius degrees. The graphic refreshes automatically so that the points are plotted in their real position in the diagram on line. The two points can be associated to the physical state of two compressors of the chiller.
svg.title: Psychrometic chart
svg.text: Humidity Ratio - grams of water per kilograms of air
